name: elastic-ai.creator
description: Design, train and compile neural networks optimized specifically for FPGAs. Obtaining a final model is typically a three stage process. * design and train it using the layers provided in the `elasticai.creator.nn` package. * translate the model to a target representation, e.g. VHDL * compile the intermediate representation with a third party tool, e.g. Xilinx Vivado (TM)
